name: Coconut Crunch Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Nuts (e.g., pecans or walnuts), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 1/3 of the cake mix for topping.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Grease and flour a 9x13 inch baking pan.
4. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, water, oil, and eggs. Mix until just combined.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. In another bowl, cut in margarine with reserved cake mix, brown sugar, and cinnamon until crumbly.
7. Stir in coconut flakes and chopped nuts; mix well.
8. Sprinkle 1 cup of the crumb mixture over the batter, swirling gently to incorporate.
9. Sprinkle remaining crumb mixture evenly over top.
10. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
11. In a small bowl, whisk together powdered sugar, vanilla extract, and milk until smooth glaze forms.
12. Drizzle glaze over warm cake before serving.
